executives.name: Daniel Muñiz Quintanilla
executives.background: Director since 2008. Former CEO of the Mining Division of Grupo Mexico.

executives.name: David Ottewell
executives.background: Mr. Ottewell has over 30 years of mining industry experience. Before joining NOVAGOLD, he was Vice President and Controller of Newmont Mining Corporation. He is a Certified Public Accountant.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Diane Garrett
executives.background: Dr. Garrett has more than 25 years of experience in the mining industry. She is currently the President and CEO of Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation.

executives.name: Richard Williams
executives.background: Mr. Williams has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in project development and operations. He previously held senior roles at Barrick Gold Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Ron Rimelman
executives.background: Mr. Rimelman has over 35 years of experience in environmental management and permitting. He previously served as Vice President, Environment, Health, Safety and Sustainability for NOVAGOLD and has extensive experience with the Donlin Gold project.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Environment, Health, Safety & Sustainability

executives.name: Tricia Pannier
executives.background: Ms. Pannier has over 20 years of experience in corporate law and governance. She previously served as Corporate Counsel for various mining and natural resource companies.

executives.name: Rick Van Nieuwenhuyse
executives.background: Mr. Van Nieuwenhuyse has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer since January 2020. He has over 40 years of experience in the natural resource sector. He was previously the President and CEO of Trilogy Metals Inc. and the founder of NovaGold Resources Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Daniel Muñiz Quintanilla
board_of_directors.background: Director since 2008. Former CEO of the Mining Division of Grupo Mexico.

board_of_directors.name: Diane Garrett
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Garrett has more than 25 years of experience in the mining industry. She is currently the President and CEO of Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Dawn Whittaker
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Whittaker is a senior lawyer with over 30 years of experience in corporate law, mergers and acquisitions, and corporate governance.

board_of_directors.name: George Brack
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Brack has over 30 years of experience in the mining investment banking and corporate development sectors. He was previously the Managing Director and Industry Head, Mining at BMO Nesbitt Burns.

board_of_directors.name: Thomas Kaplan
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Kaplan is the Chairman of the Board and has been a director since 2008. He is an entrepreneur and investor in the natural resources sector and is the Chairman and CEO of The Electrum Group LLC.
